themes.name: Redemption After Ruin
themes.shortDescription: Recovery, repair, moral return, and spiritual endurance after collapse.
themes.promptNotes: Keep the emotional arc serious, layered, and hard-won rather than sentimental.

authorships.name: William Shakespeare
authorships.description: Controlled rhetoric, balanced clauses, dramatic turn, metaphor-rich movement.

workReferences.name: Hamlet
workReferences.description: Reflective conflict, moral delay, inward argument, death-conscious introspection.
workReferences.promptNotes: Favor interior debate and sharpen the tension between thought and action.

lengthPresets.name: Medium
lengthPresets.guidance: Provide a complete thematic arc with enough depth for development.

enrichmentCategories.name: Philosophy highlights
enrichmentCategories.description: Blend reflective philosophical ideas into longer passages.

enrichmentCategories.name: Dense imagery
enrichmentCategories.description: Increase visual language, symbolism, and sensory texture.
